Strategic Technical Consulting

Technology Strategy forBusiness Growth

Comprehensive technology strategy and roadmap development for sophisticated business leaders seeking competitive advantage through strategic technology investments.

$99/month
Starting rate for ongoing strategic guidance
Project-based pricing available
Strategic Excellence

Comprehensive StrategicTechnology Services

Each engagement is tailored to your specific business objectives and technology landscape, ensuring maximum strategic value and ROI.

Technology Assessment & Strategy

2-3 weeks

Comprehensive evaluation of your current technology stack, identification of gaps, and strategic roadmap development.

Key Deliverables:

Current State Technology Audit
Gap Analysis Report
Strategic Technology Roadmap
Investment Prioritization Matrix

Digital Transformation Planning

3-4 weeks

End-to-end digital transformation strategy with clear implementation phases and success metrics.

Key Deliverables:

Digital Transformation Blueprint
Implementation Phases & Timeline
Change Management Strategy
Success Metrics & KPIs

Vendor Selection & Management

4-6 weeks

Expert guidance on technology vendor evaluation, selection, and ongoing relationship management.

Key Deliverables:

Vendor Evaluation Matrix
RFP Development & Management
Contract Negotiation Support
Vendor Management Framework

Risk Assessment & Mitigation

2-3 weeks

Proactive identification of technology risks and development of comprehensive mitigation strategies.

Key Deliverables:

Technology Risk Assessment
Risk Mitigation Strategies
Security & Compliance Review
Business Continuity Planning

Our StrategicConsulting Process

A proven methodology that ensures your technology strategy aligns perfectly with your business objectives and growth plans.

01
1-2 weeks

Discovery & Assessment

Comprehensive evaluation of your current technology landscape, business objectives, and strategic goals.

Key Activities:

Stakeholder interviews and workshops
Technology infrastructure audit
Business process analysis
Competitive landscape review
02
2-3 weeks

Strategy Development

Creation of a comprehensive technology strategy aligned with your business objectives and growth plans.

Key Activities:

Strategic roadmap development
Technology architecture planning
Investment prioritization
ROI analysis and projections
03
1-2 weeks

Implementation Planning

Detailed implementation planning with clear phases, timelines, and resource requirements.

Key Activities:

Project planning and scheduling
Resource requirement analysis
Risk assessment and mitigation
Success metrics definition
04
Ongoing

Ongoing Support

Continuous strategic guidance and support throughout the implementation phase and beyond.

Key Activities:

Monthly strategic reviews
Implementation oversight
Performance monitoring
Strategic adjustments as needed

Frequently Asked Questions

How long does a typical strategic consulting engagement last?

Most strategic consulting engagements range from 4-12 weeks for the initial strategy development, followed by ongoing monthly check-ins for implementation support. The exact timeline depends on the complexity of your technology landscape and strategic objectives.

What deliverables can I expect from the consulting engagement?

You'll receive a comprehensive technology strategy document, detailed implementation roadmap, vendor evaluation matrices, risk assessment reports, and ROI projections. All deliverables are customized to your specific business needs and objectives.

How do you ensure the strategy aligns with our business goals?

Every strategy begins with deep stakeholder interviews and business objective analysis. I work closely with your leadership team to ensure all technology recommendations directly support your growth plans and competitive positioning.

Can you help with implementation after the strategy is complete?

Absolutely. I offer ongoing implementation support through my Complete Implementation Services, or I can help you select and manage external vendors for execution while providing strategic oversight throughout the process.

What makes your approach different from other technology consultants?

My approach combines deep technical expertise with business strategy experience. I focus on delivering measurable ROI and ensuring every technology investment directly contributes to your growth objectives, not just solving technical problems.
